{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Rippling Swords
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Rippling Swords]] is a technique used by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
